detail.description:
The Cozy Florist: The Story of My Own Little Flower Shop and Garden

Are you looking for a healing game filled with warm sentiments that keeps you entertained without a dull moment? Do you want to meet like-minded friends but find awkward social interactions burdensome? This game, filled with flowers and sentiment, will solve all your worries right now!

Running a flower shop + tending a garden—double the fun, pure healing!

Experience a time of healing by collecting various flowers and tending
